message:
test(qq): add assertion for URL-encoded double-dot path traversal (%2E%2E)

Extend the sanitize_path_segment rejection test to cover the
case-insensitive %2E%2E encoding of ".." which was added to the
detection logic in the prior security hardening commit but lacked
a dedicated test assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
